parameters.query: =SELECT opp_title, agency, estimated_value, naics_code, set_aside, eis_fit_score, response_deadline, stage, level_1, level_2 FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE LOWER(agency) LIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.agency || '' }}') || '%' OR LOWER(level_1) LIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.agency || '' }}') || '%' ORDER BY eis_fit_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 15
SELECT id, opportunity, agency, contract_value, plan_data->>'executive_summary' as exec_summary, created_at FROM gda_capture_plans ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT title, severity, category, description FROM gda_risk_register WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(status,'')) NOT IN ('dismissed','closed','resolved') ORDER BY CASE UPPER(severity) WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 0 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 5

=SELECT opportunity, agency, outcome, lesson_text, stage_from, stage_to, created_at FROM gda_capture_lessons WHERE LOWER(agency) LIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.agency || '' }}') || '%' OR LOWER(naics_code) = LOWER('{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.naics || '' }}') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT cp.id, cp.opportunity, cp.agency, cp.contract_value, cp.plan_data, cp.opp_title, cp.created_at, COALESCE(cp.updated_at, cp.created_at) as updated_at, CASE WHEN ot.gda_label = 'PASS' OR ot.stage = 'No-Bid' THEN true ELSE false END as no_bid FROM gda_capture_plans cp LEFT JOIN gda_opportunity_tracker ot ON ot.id = cp.opp_id ORDER BY COALESCE(cp.updated_at, cp.created_at) DESC LIMIT 100;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (function() { const plans = $input.all().map(i => i.json); const DONE = ['No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won']; const active = plans.filter(function(p) { const s = (p.plan_data && p.plan_data.stage) || 'Go/No-Go'; return !DONE.includes(s); }); const totalTCV = active.reduce(function(s, p) { const raw = String((p.plan_data && p.plan_data.total_contract_value) || '0').replace(/[$,]/g,''); const v = parseFloat(raw); return s + (isNaN(v) ? 0 : v); }, 0); const totalAlloc = active.reduce(function(s, p) { const raw = String((p.plan_data && p.plan_data.allocated_revenue_value) || '0').replace(/[$,]/g,''); const v = parseFloat(raw); return s + (isNaN(v) ? 0 : v); }, 0); const pursuing = active.filter(function(p) { const s = (p.plan_data && p.plan_data.stage) || ''; return ['Pursue','Proposal','Post-Submittal'].includes(s); }).length; return JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', plans: plans, count: plans.length, kpis: { totalCapture: active.length, pursuing: pursuing, totalTCV: totalTCV, totalTCVM: (totalTCV/1000000).toFixed(1), totalAlloc: totalAlloc, totalAllocM: (totalAlloc/1000000).toFixed(1) } }); })() }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE gda_capture_plans SET opportunity=COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.opp }}',''), opportunity), agency=COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.ag }}',''), agency), contract_value=COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.cv }}',''), contract_value), plan_data = plan_data || '{{ $json.pd }}'::jsonb, opp_title=COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.ot }}',''), opp_title), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id={{ $json.planId }} RETURNING id

=INSERT INTO gda_capture_plans (opportunity, agency, contract_value, plan_data, opp_title) VALUES ('{{ $json.opp }}', '{{ $json.ag }}', '{{ $json.cv }}', '{{ $json.pd }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.ot }}') RETURNING id

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'ok', message:'Capture plan saved', id: $input.first().json.id || null}) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ auth_key: $env.GDA_WEBHOOK_HEADER_VALUE_V2, direction: 'cap_to_opp', source: 'capture-plan-save', plan_id: $json.id || $json.plan_id || null, changes: { opportunity: $json.opportunity || '', agency: $json.agency || '' } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const b=$('Webhook').first().json.body;const phase=b.phase||'Go/No-Go';const pd=b.plan_data||{};const F={'Go/No-Go':'Strategic alignment assessment','Interest':'Initial opportunity assessment','Qualify':'SWOT and competitive analysis','Pursue':'Capture strategy development','Solicitation':'Bid/no-bid decision','Proposal':'Proposal competitiveness review','Post-Submittal':'Evaluation preparation','Awaiting Approval':'Position assessment','Award':'Execution planning'};const EIS_WIN_THEMES_SHORT = ['Incumbency/mission continuity (PM Mission Command FCL active)','C5ISR/IEW&S domain depth (CP CE, MCE/JBC-P, FSC2/AFATDS, SMART, CPI2)','Army-centric culture and PM/PdM relationships','Small business agility — price competitive vs large primes','IC IT crossover credibility (Army tactical + IC hybrid programs)','Shipley-disciplined capture with calibrated pwin','Active SECRET FCL / cleared on-site workforce'];
const prompt='You are a Shipley-certified capture strategist for Envision Innovative Solutions (EIS) / GDA OU3, focused on Army C5ISR, IEW&S, signals intelligence, and IC IT. EIS holds an active SECRET FCL. Apply EIS win themes in every recommendation.
EIS WIN THEMES: '+EIS_WIN_THEMES_SHORT.join(' | ')+'

OODA analysis for '+phase+' phase.
Opp: '+(pd.opportunity_name||pd.codename||b.opportunity||'Unknown')+'
Agency: '+(pd.agency||pd.division_owners||'Unknown')+'
Value: $'+Number(String(pd.total_contract_value||'0').replace(/[$,]/g,'')).toLocaleString()+'
Type: '+(pd.contract_type||'TBD')+'
NAICS: '+(pd.naics||'TBD')+'
Incumbent: '+(pd.incumbent||'Unknown')+'
Pwin: '+(pd.pwin||'TBD')+'%
Strengths: '+(pd.eis_strengths||'N/A')+'
Weaknesses: '+(pd.eis_weaknesses||'N/A')+'
Competitors: '+(pd.known_competitors||'N/A')+'
Focus: '+(F[phase]||F['Go/No-Go'])+'

RESPOND JSON ONLY:{"phase":"...","observe":{"title":"What We Know","findings":[],"data_gaps":[],"sources":[]},"orient":{"title":"What It Means","assessment":"...","implications":[],"competitive_position":"..."},"decide":{"title":"Recommended Actions","recommendation":"...","actions":[{"action":"...","owner":"...","priority":"HIGH","due":"..."}],"risks":[{"risk":"...","mitigation":"..."}]},"act":{"title":"Execution Plan","immediate":[],"short_term":[],"long_term":[]},"confidence":0,"next_phase_ready":false,"gate_criteria_met":[],"gate_criteria_not_met":[]}';
return[{json:{prompt,phase,plan_id:b.plan_id}}];

const raw=$input.first().json;const ctx=$('Build Phase Prompt').first().json;let text='';if(raw.content&&Array.isArray(raw.content))text=raw.content.map(c=>c.text||'').join('');else text=JSON.stringify(raw);let a={};try{a=JSON.parse(text.replace(/```json/g,'').replace(/```/g,'').trim());}catch(e){const m=text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);if(m)try{a=JSON.parse(m[0]);}catch(e2){a={error:'Parse failed'};}}return[{json:{status:'ok',phase:ctx.phase,plan_id:ctx.plan_id,analysis:a,analyzed_at:new Date().toISOString()}}];

parameters.query: UPDATE gda_capture_plans SET plan_data = plan_data || jsonb_build_object('comp_intel', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.comp_intel).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, 'teaming_recommendations', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.teaming).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, 'ai_assist_generated_at', '{{ new Date().toISOString() }}') WHERE id = {{ $json.plan_id }}
